run_instructions: python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && REPLAY_ONLY=1 uvicorn app.main:app --reload  then open http://127.0.0.1:8000  (deterministic replay mode needs no API key; set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and REPLAY_ONLY=0 to run the live Claude tool-use agent). See DEMO_GUIDE.md.
wedge: AgentReady harness — a live, reproducible agent task-success-rate metric that attributes each agent failure to a specific doc gap, and shows a before/after jump when the gap is patched.
magic_moment: On one screen, a real Claude tool-use agent runs a suite of concrete developer tasks against a bundled synthetic MemStore API using only the provided docs. First run against deliberately-gapped docs scores ~75% task success, with each failure traced to a named doc gap (undocumented SQL-style metadata filter param, wrong auth header, missing pagination cursor field). Click 'Apply doc patch' to swap in the complete docs and re-run: the same agent now scores ~100%, the success-rate number climbs live, and every previously-failing task flips red -> green. Turns Manicule's '0% vs 25% agent error' marketing claim into a live, per-gap-attributed metric.

gate.tests: 11 passed (pytest, keyless smoke test asserts gapped < 100% and fixed == 100%)
gate.note: CI returned checks-passed: repo has no GitHub Actions workflow, so the monitor found no required checks and cleared green. PR #1 was merged into master.

secrets_scan: clean — no secrets in diff; .env and _local/ are git-ignored and untracked; only placeholder sk-ant-xxxx in .env.example

assets.DEMO_GUIDE.md: present, Loom talking points + company hooks

known_gaps: No live hosted URL: the dashboard is served by the FastAPI backend (POST /api/run/{variant}), so a static GitHub Pages deploy would require an ungated client-side rewrite, and no Python-host deploy token (Render/Fly/Railway) is configured. Fallback per architecture: ship repo + local run instructions.

Live Claude tool-use path exists but the shipped demo defaults to deterministic REPLAY_ONLY mode (cached agent traces in replay/*.json) so it runs with no API key; the live path is exercised only when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set and REPLAY_ONLY=0.
The doc 'fix' is a pre-authored fixture swap (docs_gapped/ -> docs_fixed/), not LLM-generated on the fly.
Single bundled synthetic API (MemStore) only; arbitrary user-uploaded OpenAPI specs are out of scope.
Task suite is ~10 tasks; gap attribution is rule-based + LLM-judge on that fixed suite.
